name: UTAH MEDICAL PRODUCTS INC
summary: Utah Medical Products, Inc. (UTMD) designs, manufactures, and markets high-quality medical devices focused on labor and delivery, neonatal intensive care, and women's health. Key products include INTRAN PLUS intrauterine pressure catheters, TENDER TOUCH vacuum-assisted delivery cups, Filshie Clip System for sterilization, and neonatal care devices. UTMD sells directly to hospitals and clinics in the US, UK, Ireland, Canada, Australia, New Zealand, and France, and through approximately 200 international distributors.
